data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"c737-977d","generatedAt":"2026-04-17T02:29:02.613658Z","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"[worktree-integration]: fix-bug and debug-everything dispatch isolation:worktree without a harvest/integration path -> agent results orphaned and cleanup impossible","successCriteria":["SC1: /dso:fix-bug and /dso:debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode produce clean session commits with zero leftover agent worktree or worktree-agent-* branch","SC2: fix-bug's post-fix gates execute inside the agent worktree against pre-commit working-tree diff (mirroring sprint)","SC3: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/single-agent-integrate.md exists and is referenced by fix-bug and debug-everything at the post-fix-sub-agent-dispatch integration point","SC4: Dispatch templates enforce {orchestrator_root} placeholder substitution; fails closed when absent/unsubstituted","SC5: Post-dispatch verification quarantines sub-agent outputs when Agent result worktreePath equals orchestrator's git root","SC6: Walking the be6c-ed89 incident with SC4+SC5 active would detect the leak before files land on session branch"]},"considerations":["[Testing] LLM-behavioral changes to fix-bug/debug-everything SKILL.md \u2014 use eval-based verification or behavioral assertions for skill guidance; standard TDD for the validation hook and orchestrator verification code.","[Reliability] SC5 quarantine is a new failure mode; non-interactive mode records INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED; graceful degradation when platform omits worktreePath.","[Maintainability] single-agent-integrate.md is a third per-worktree-style prompt; document delta vs. per-worktree-review-commit.md to prevent drift."],"stories":[],"overrideCheck":{"multiple_personas":false,"ui_and_backend":false,"new_db_migration":false,"foundation_enhancement_candidate":false,"external_integration":false,"complex_override_triggered":false}}
